PEOPLE WILL BE JAILED FOR USING AI

No one is afraid of a sovereign internet anymore, so here's a sovereign AI for you

U.S. authorities have ordered Anthropic to restrict access to its two most powerful models - Fable 5 and Mythos 5

The reason is that the model is just too good at finding vulnerabilities in the code, which means hackers will exploit it. So the risk to national security is no longer just a theoretical one.

But here's the most unusual part: the restriction applied to foreigners. In other words, even the company's own employees who were NOT U.S. citizens couldn't use this very Fable 5.

Obviously, Anthropic doesn't have a system for verifying users' citizenship, but… if you really want to, you can come up with something.

A theory has emerged that these are the first steps toward sovereign AI - soon it will be so advanced that it will be dangerous if it falls into the hands of the North Koreans or the Chinese.

So in a few years, accessing the most powerful models will require full verification, just like at banks or crypto exchanges
